name: The Coral Thicket
description: A dense mass of crystallized organic matter in shades of blue, green, pink, and violet, glowing with soft bioluminescence against the void-dark. The coral structures twist and branch in impossible spiraling patterns, creating a labyrinth of sharp beauty. The air around it shimmers with warmth and drifting spores.
aspect: Everything Here Grows Toward Something Hungry

rooms.name: Coral Threshold
rooms.description: The thicket begins as a wall of pale blue-green crystalline growths, branching outward like fingers against the void-dark. The formations are translucent, lit from within by slow bioluminescent pulses. The air here is warm and faintly sweet, with a mineral edge. Underfoot, the ground transitions from bare rock to a crust of tiny coral nubs.
aspects: Beautiful Enough to Drop Your Guard
The Sweetness Wants Something From You

rooms.name: Luminous Grove
rooms.description: A clearing among the coral where enormous fan-shaped growths arch overhead, filtering light into shifting blue and green dapples across the ground. The space is roughly circular, ten paces wide. A crude lean-to of stacked coral slabs and fabric scraps leans against the largest formation, its entrance hung with a torn curtain.
aspects: Someone Lived Here For a Reason

rooms.name: Narrow Coral Tunnel
rooms.description: A tight passage between walls of dense coral, barely shoulder-width. The formations press in from both sides, their surfaces studded with thorn-like protrusions that scrape fabric and skin. The coral pulses with slow internal light — pink and violet close up — and the air is close and humid.
aspects: No Room to Swing a Sword

rooms.name: Spore Chamber
rooms.description: A vast hollow chamber, high-ceilinged and dark at its edges. Clouds of luminous spores drift through the space like slow-motion snow, each mote glowing soft yellow-green. They pulse in unison — bright, dim, bright — and the air is thick, warm, and sweet enough to taste. The ground is spongy with accumulated organic matter.
aspects: Breathe Wrong and You'll See Things
The Warmth Makes You Want to Stay

rooms.name: Heart of the Thicket
rooms.description: The deepest chamber of the thicket, where the coral formations are ancient and intricately branched — some as tall as trees, their surfaces encrusted with smaller growths in white, pink, and deep violet. A small garden of cultivated coral occupies the center, tended beds marked with careful borders. Among the oldest roots, a lattice of living crystal pulses with steady green light.

enemies_data.name: Thorn Crawler
enemies_data.description: A coral-armored predator that blends with the thicket walls. It strikes from ambush, its barbed limbs lashing out with surprising speed.
aspects: Strikes Before You Know It's There
Part of the Wall Until It Isn't

enemies_data.name: Thorn Crawler Alpha
enemies_data.description: The largest of its kind, this crawler has grown thick coral plating and developed a cunning patience. It waits until prey is committed before striking.
aspects: It Can Wait Longer Than You Can

enemies_data.name: Spore Cloud
enemies_data.description: Not a creature exactly — a living cloud of luminous spores that drifts with purpose. Inhaling them causes disorientation and hallucinations.
aspects: One Breath and the World Goes Sideways
It Goes Where the Air Goes
